# BOSS APEX meeting preparation checklist

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: BOSS and UH APEX Accelerator
Resource type: Checklist
Business stage: Operations, Growth

## BOSS routing summary
Use this checklist when a legally formed, for-profit business is preparing to meet with UH APEX about government contracting.

## Preparation checklist
- Confirm physical business address, city, county, and ZIP.
- Confirm legal formation and for-profit status.
- Write a one-page explanation of what the business sells.
- Identify target buyer type: federal, Texas state, local Houston-area government, airport, port, school district, university, or prime contractor.
- Gather EIN, entity documents, DBA, and tax account information if available.
- Gather UEI, CAGE, SAM.gov status, CMBL status, and certifications if available.
- List possible NAICS, NIGP, and PSC codes if known.
- Prepare a draft capability statement if available.
- List prior commercial customers, past performance, or relevant owner experience.
- Bring links to solicitations, bid opportunities, or agency portals.
- Prepare three to five questions for the advisor.

## Guardrails
- Do not guarantee funding, certification, contract awards, bid outcomes, advisor acceptance, or timing.
- Do not provide legal, tax, accounting, lending, cybersecurity-compliance, or contracting decisions as professional advice.
- Use the official source URL as the source of truth for current eligibility, forms, events, links, and deadlines.
- For dynamic training or event pages, route users to the current official listing instead of relying on stored dates.
